ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Original input address */,
  "matchedness" TEXT /* Match status of the address (Match, No Match, etc.) */,
  "exactness" TEXT /* Exactness of the match (Exact, Non-Exact, etc.) */,
  "matched_address" TEXT /* Matched address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the matched address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the matched address */,
  "L_or_R" TEXT /* Left or Right side of the street (L or R) */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code of the matched address */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code of the matched address */,
  "tract_code" INTEGER /* Tract code of the matched address */,
  "total_tract_pop_maybe" INTEGER /* Total population of the tract (maybe) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the address was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the address was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "tract_code" INTEGER /* Tract code */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Total housing units */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Female population */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Male population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address-demographic relationship */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the addresses table */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the demographics table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
